content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.kplctv.com/2026/04/02/benefits-risks-intermittent-fasting/", "source_title": "Benefits and risks of intermittent fasting", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Worldwide adult obesity has more than tripled since 1975, according to the WHO.", "direct_quote": "Worldwide adult obesity has more than tripled since 1975, according to the WHO.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In 2022, 2.5 billion adults were overweight.", "direct_quote": "In 2022, 2.5 billion adults were overweight.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "No meaningful difference in weight loss\nResearchers analyzed evidence from 22 randomized clinical trials involving 1,995 adults across North...", "direct_quote": "No meaningful difference in weight loss\nResearchers analyzed evidence from 22 randomized clinical trials involving 1,995 adults across North America, Europe, China, Australia, and South America.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
